title: Fast Fiction Factory Bridge Editorial Handoff Pack
purpose: Convert the preserved six-beat Bridge Storyboard Flow into a focused local manual-delivery route and a portable Markdown/CSV/JSON package with exact 180-second timing, provisional narration, subtitle and shot cues, truth/rights guards, and SHA256 integrity metadata while every provider, production, rights, and canon gate remains closed.
generated_from: User feedback: guided flow still looked like mass notes or lecture notes
User review: Review Hub too vertically long, English-first, layered between story and project information, and Raw Story Memo sticky behavior feels awkward
User feedback: low-text console improved but card-format limitation and hardcoded choices remained
Playwright visual evidence for layout-lab, brief, and bridge
User review: applied shell still felt card-like, duplicated global explanation, and unclear component responsibilities
Human observation: top Workbench accepted; lower page remains long and dense; BRIDGE_STORYBOARD_FLOW selected
editorial_handoff_line_ending_policy: LF enforced by .gitattributes for portable byte-size and SHA256 verification
editorial_handoff_portability_validation: passed 6/6 filtered checkout files; LF-only bytes, working-tree hashes, and package-manifest hashes matched with core.autocrlf=true on 2026-07-12
validation_command: & { $files = @('public/review/index.html', 'docs/review/bridge-editorial-handoff-pack.md', 'artifacts/bridge-editorial-handoff-pack-result.json', 'artifacts/editorial-handoff/README_DELIVERY.md', 'artifacts/editorial-handoff/narration-script.md', 'artifacts/editorial-handoff/subtitle-cues.csv', 'artifacts/editorial-handoff/shot-list.csv', 'artifacts/editorial-handoff/editorial-handoff.json', 'artifacts/editorial-handoff/package-manifest.json', 'docs/review/bridge-storyboard-flow.md', 'artifacts/bridge-storyboard-flow-result.json', 'docs/review/review-workbench-component-contract.md', 'artifacts/review-workbench-component-contract-result.json', 'docs/review/draft-to-video-planning-bridge.md', 'artifacts/draft-to-video-planning-bridge-result.json', 'docs/review/contradictory-claim-guard.md', 'artifacts/contradictory-claim-guard-result.json', 'tools/fff-state.mjs', 'artifacts/artifact-manifest.json', 'artifacts/ARTIFACTS.md', 'docs/project-context.md', 'docs/project-overview.md', 'docs/decision-log.md', 'docs/idea-ledger.md', 'docs/review/current-status.md', 'docs/review/next-terminal-handoff.md', 'mkdocs.yml'); $missing = $files | Where-Object { -not (Test-Path $_) }; if ($missing) { throw ('Missing files: ' + ($missing -join ', ')) }; node --check tools/fff-state.mjs; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'State tool syntax failed' }; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-bridge-editorial-handoff-pack artifacts/bridge-editorial-handoff-pack-result.json; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'Bridge Editorial Handoff Pack validation failed' }; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-bridge-storyboard-flow artifacts/bridge-storyboard-flow-result.json; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'Bridge Storyboard Flow validation failed' }; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-review-workbench-component-contract artifacts/review-workbench-component-contract-result.json; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'Review Workbench Component Contract validation failed' }; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-draft-to-video-planning-bridge artifacts/draft-to-video-planning-bridge-result.json; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'Draft-to-video planning bridge validation failed' }; $manifest = Get-Content artifacts/artifact-manifest.json -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($manifest.artifact_id -ne 'fff-bridge-editorial-handoff-pack-001' -or $manifest.default_review_mode -ne 'brief' -or $manifest.review_input_mode -ne 'freeform') { throw 'Manifest active Editorial Handoff Pack mismatch' }; $html = Get-Content public/review/index.html -Raw -Encoding UTF8; @('data-mode-panel="handoff"', 'data-editorial-handoff-root="true"', 'data-handoff-runway', 'data-handoff-active-beat', 'data-handoff-package-files', 'data-handoff-return-bridge', 'data-handoff-return-brief', 'data-bridge-open-handoff="true"', 'const bridgeEditorialHandoffModel', 'data-bridge-storyboard-flow="true"', 'data-review-workbench-canvas="true"') | ForEach-Object { if (-not $html.Contains($_)) { throw ('Missing Editorial Handoff marker: ' + $_) } }; Write-Output 'Bridge Editorial Handoff Pack read-only validation passed' }
scope_lock_validation_result: passed 2026-06-23T18:00:28+09:00; fff-downstream-adoption-gate-scope-lock-001 parsed and confirmed readback-only, no adoption implementation, no Profile/Claim/Timeline mutation, no canon promotion, no DB persistence, no model/API/provider execution, no production sync, contradictory claims held, and pre-adoption source/routing/hold checks preserved over the latest downstream gate readback.
review_prompt_hint: Open public/review/index.html?mode=handoff and use artifacts/editorial-handoff/ for manual editorial transfer while preserving provisional status, exact timing, held truths, and unselected assets.
next_action: A writer, subtitle editor, or video editor may refine the local package manually. Provider/API, credential, external call, generation, render, upload, database, rights-clearance, and final-canon gates remain closed.
handoff_remote_sync_note: This records the synced baseline before the 2026-07-11 Editorial Handoff Pack implementation. After pulling the published commit, use git log -1 --oneline --decorate for the exact final commit.
